name: Gypsy Flocks
description: Nomadic performers and artisans who bring music, news, and goods to isolated settlements, while unknowingly serving as the unwitting guardians of the world's stability.

secret_mission.quest: Find the 12 Sacred Groves and enact the Ritual of Return to bring The Fae back to the world.
secret_mission.true_purpose: Preservation of the current world order, unknowingly serving as the guardians of the system they seek to dismantle.
